{{Quote|No fighting broke out, but the CSA fleet managed to land one of their Enforcer Battle Groups and now control 25% of the planet Kirima. The Kalindans control the asteroid belt and 40% of the planet.|[[Alinda Solaris]]|<ref name="DS" />}}
The '''Kalinda Asteroid Belt''' was an [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] belt in the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]].
